ddls:
CREATE TABLE "daily_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily metric entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded metrics */,
  "exchange_to_miner_flow_total" REAL /* Total flow to miners from exchanges */,
  "exchange_to_miner_transactions_count_flow" INTEGER /* Count of transactions sent to miners from exchanges */,
  "exchange_to_miner_flow_mean" REAL /* Mean flow to miners from exchanges */,
  "miner_flow_outflow_total" REAL /* Total outflow from miners */,
  "miner_flow_outflow_top10" REAL /* Highest outflow from top 10 miners */,
  "miner_flow_outflow_mean" REAL /* Mean outflow from miners */,
  "miner_flow_outflow_mean_ma7" REAL /* Mean outflow (7-day moving average) */,
  "transactions_count_total" INTEGER /* Total count of transactions for the day */,
  "transactions_count_mean" REAL /* Mean number of transactions */,
  "volume_traded" REAL /* Total volume traded in the day */,
  "average_transaction_size" REAL /* Average size of transactions in the day */,
  "blockchain_height" INTEGER /* Height of the blockchain on the recorded date */,
  "block_reward" REAL /* Block reward for the recorded date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial indicator entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded indicators */,
  "thermo_cap" REAL /* Thermodynamic capital of the network */,
  "mvrv" REAL /* Market Value to Realized Value ratio */,
  "stablecoin_supply_ratio" REAL /* Stablecoin supply ratio */,
  "nvm" REAL /* Network Value to Metcalfe's Value ratio */,
  "nvt" REAL /* Network Value to Transaction ratio */,
  "puell_index" REAL /* Puell Index for mining profitability */,
  "stock_to_flow" REAL /* Stock-to-flow ratio for scarcity measurement */,
  "stock_to_flow_reversion" REAL /* Reversion of stock-to-flow ratio */,
  "bollinger_bands" REAL /* Bollinger Bands for volatility measurement */,
  "moving_averages" REAL /* Moving Averages for trend analysis */,
  "relative_strength_index" REAL /* Relative Strength Index for momentum analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "miners" (
  "miner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each miner */,
  "miner_name" TEXT /* Name of the mining entity */,
  "total_outflow" REAL /* Total outflow from this miner */,
  "transaction_count" INTEGER /* Count of transactions from this miner */,
  "top_transaction" REAL /* Highest single transaction from this miner */,
  "miner_hash_rate" REAL /* Hash rate of the miner */,
  "miner_efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the miner */,
  "miner_revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the miner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("miner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "miner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the miner processing the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount transacted */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell, transfer) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee paid for the transaction */,
  "confirmation_time" INTEGER /* Time taken for the transaction to be confirmed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_miner_id FOREIGN KEY ("miner_id") REFERENCES miners ("miner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction log */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction recorded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the transaction */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the transaction log entry */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., buy, sell, cancel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price_drop, transaction_update) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the alert has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "liquidity_metrics" (
  "liquidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each liquidity metric entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded liquidity metrics */,
  "liquidity_ratio" REAL /* Liquidity ratio for a specific currency */,
  "exchange_volume" REAL /* Total exchange volume for the day */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Total market cap for the currency */,
  "bid_ask_spread" REAL /* Bid-ask spread for the currency */,
  "order_book_depth" REAL /* Depth of the order book for the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("liquidity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_whales" (
  "whale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each whale entry */,
  "wallet_address" TEXT /* Wallet address of the whale */,
  "balance" REAL /* Balance held by the whale */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Last active date of the wallet */,
  "num_transactions" INTEGER /* Number of transactions made by the whale */,
  "avg_transaction_size" REAL /* Average size of transactions made by the whale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("whale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blockchain_data" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "block_height" INTEGER /* Height of the block */,
  "block_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the block */,
  "block_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the block */,
  "block_reward" REAL /* Reward for the block */,
  "difficulty" REAL /* Difficulty of the block */,
  "num_transactions" INTEGER /* Number of transactions in the block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network metric entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded metrics */,
  "hash_rate" REAL /* Hash rate of the network */,
  "block_time" REAL /* Average block time of the network */,
  "difficulty" REAL /* Difficulty of the network */,
  "network_traffic" REAL /* Network traffic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)
